verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a Golgi-resident type II glycosyltransferase with its catalytic domain facing the lumen of the TGN/Golgi cisternae. The protein is constitutively retained in the Golgi via retrieval signals and does not traffic to the plasma membrane under baseline, stress, activation, or cell-death conditions. No evidence for dual localization, shedding, or surface anchoring via partner proteins. Not a surface-accessible target.
